[category]
matching
[prompt]
In Alice's Wonderland, secret processing rules are used on text.

x: not matched anywhere
y: matched but wrong position

0 1001000 2
1 0010100 2
2 0000000 a
3 0000000 a
4 1011111 6
5 1101011 5
6 1110111 6
7 0111100 4

01 10 1111111 a
12 21 1111111 a
23 32 1111111 a
34 43 0111101 5
45 54 1100111 5
56 65 1101110 5
67 76 1011100 4
70 07 1011111 6 match 4

02 20 1111111 a
13 31 1111111 a
24 42 1110111 6 match 6
35 53 1111110 6
46 64 1101101 5
57 75 1110110 5
60 06 1011111 6 match 4
71 17 1111111 a

03 30 1111111 a
14 41 1101111 6
25 52 1110111 6 match 6
36 63 1111100 5
47 74 0110101 4
50 05 1111111 a
61 16 1101011 5 match 5
72 27 1110111 6 match 6

04 40 1111111 a
15 51 1101111 6
26 62 1111111 a
37 73 0111100 4 match 7
